interface.name: 7-Zip
interface.summary: file archiver with a high compression ratio
interface.description: 7-Zip is a file archiver with a high compression ratio. It uses its own 7z format with LZMA/LZMA2 compression, and also packs and unpacks ZIP, GZIP, BZIP2, XZ, TAR and WIM archives, while extracting many more formats including RAR, CAB, ISO, DMG and MSI.

entry-point.name: 7-Zip GUI command-line
entry-point.summary: Runs 7-Zip command-line instructions and shows the progress and result in a GUI

entry-point.name: 7-Zip File Manager
entry-point.summary: Graphical file manager for creating, exploring and extracting archives
